title: Apply formulas to mirror columns from other boards
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’m trying to do some formulas using mirror columns from other boards, is this possible? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m trying to do some formulas using mirror columns from other boards, is this possible?

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Yes it certainly is possible to use mirrored columns in a formula column. Let us know if you run into any issues getting this set up

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’ve been able to do some formulas with mirror columns from the same board, but if I use a mirror column in another board my formulas doesn’t work

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hm, would you be happy to send over a screenshot so I can take a look at the error/roadblock?

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,

I already solved this, I was dividing by 0 on the original column therefore when I was trying to mirror the column I was having errors. I also found the solution on how to avoid errors when diving by 0 with the community forum.

Thank you very much!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah thank you for letting me know, glad to hear you were able to get this sorted!
